scope.note: single feature surface; one feat WP

size.note: one coherent frontend surface against one contract; SEA kept it one WP deliberately

in_changes.issue: chat.send relay built+tested but never wired to composer; 'Enter to send' hint has no handler; only Start work (chat->card) exists. ProductChat streamed-reply path unreachable.
pendingProvider optimistic state never resets and is not keyed by scope; shadows real provider after refetch and across product switches.
switchProvider has no try/catch; failed PUT -> unhandled rejection + un-rolled-back optimistic state, no error surfaced.
headerGlyph computed only to feed a hidden unasserted span.
useStartFromIntent return not memoized -> propose effect runs every render (masked by null-reset guard); cardProductId not reset in handleSwitch (masked by callers re-setting).

resolution: All in-scope. F-01,F-02,F-03,F-04,F-05 fixed inline; F-06,F-07 fixed inline (cheap robustness). Re-review confirms zero findings.
